reasoning: The market estimated a 94% chance of them being on good terms as of late November 2025. Despite a severe and highly publicized feud in June and July 2025 over federal spending and political disagreements, Musk and Trump have explicitly reconciled in the fall. In late October, Trump confirmed they were back in touch and on good terms. In November, Musk was invited to and attended a White House State Dinner, which major outlets described as cementing the thaw in their relationship. As recently as early December, Trump stated he "likes Elon a lot," and his administration actively defended Musk's platform (X) against a $140 million EU fine. While they still have policy disagreements (e.g., over tariffs), they have moved past the bitter personal insults of the summer. With only a few weeks remaining until the end of 2025, a spontaneous new rupture of the magnitude seen in July is highly unlikely. Given the current trajectory and public demonstrations of alliance, the probability they are on good terms at the end of 2025 is extremely high.
